scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/backend && npm run build --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/backend && npm run test --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/backend && npm run lint --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @gabriels-portfolio/frontend
